structurePatterns: Active item = flat gray background (tier3-line #E7E7E7), ink-primary text
NOT blue — active state is monochrome
Section headers = caption style (12px, ink-tertiary), uppercase or muted
Tab underline = 2px accent blue (#336EE8) on selected tab — the ONLY place blue appears in nav
Tab text = ink-secondary default, ink-primary when selected
usageHints: Web track: top horizontal nav (desktop) or bottom tab bar (mobile)
App track: rail (60px) + optional sidebar (264px) on left
Active indicator is monochrome gray, not blue — blue reserved for tab underline only
Badge on nav item uses mono number, subtle gray bg
Collapsed sidebar shows icons only with tooltip on hover
doNotInvent: Blue active backgrounds on nav items — active = flat gray
Colored icons in nav — all icons are ink-secondary monochrome
Animated icon transitions beyond standard easing
